prompt:
Goal: Create a bold fashion magazine cover featuring a young woman with long light-brown hair wearing a white baseball cap and a black ribbed halter top, posed from the chest up against a glossy golden satin fabric background. The model is centered, cropped close, with a large opaque square censor block covering the entire face area from forehead to chin; the square should be a warm beige-brown tone matching the cover palette.

Canvas: Vertical portrait magazine cover, 3:4 aspect ratio, high-resolution editorial print design. Use a saturated golden-yellow background with dark chocolate-brown typography. The overall look should be luxurious, sporty, feminine, and unapologetically graphic.

Layout: Oversized condensed serif masthead text fills the top and continues behind the model, reading HER19845. The letters are extremely tall, tightly spaced, and partially obscured by the cap and hair. Place additional huge cropped numeral-like typography behind the model on the left-center. Keep the model in the center foreground, with the cap brim extending left. Use strong magazine-cover layering: background fabric, huge masthead, model, censor square, then smaller cover lines.

Visible text elements: Include exactly 8 distinct text/graphic label groups: 1) giant top masthead “HER19845”; 2) small left label “SPRING / SUMMER 2024”; 3) large stacked left cover line OWN EVERY FRAME; 4) small right tagline “BOLD FEMININE UNAPOLOGETIC”; 5) right-side label “EST. 19845” with a horizontal rule below it; 6) large lower-right title HER; 7) small lower-right caption “POWER IN FOCUS. STYLE IN MOTION.”; 8) tiny footer copyright “© HER19845 ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.” plus a small globe icon nearby.

Subject details: The white baseball cap should look softly wrinkled with dark navy cursive embroidery on the front. Hair falls around both sides of the censor square. The black halter top has visible ribbed texture and a deep neckline. Skin is warmly lit with editorial studio lighting.

Visual style: High-fashion magazine cover, sharp commercial photography mixed with bold graphic design, heavy contrast, warm gold palette, glossy satin folds, dramatic typography, clean print finish, no border.

Constraints: Keep all text in dark brown or near-black. Do not add extra headlines beyond the 8 listed groups. Keep the censor square perfectly rectangular, centered over the face, and opaque. Make the composition look like a finished luxury sports-fashion magazine cover, not a poster mockup.
